title: opt_expr: improve single-bit $and/$or/$xor/$xnor cells; gate cells too

features.name: multi-bit constant AND with wire
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit wire assignment using bitwise AND between a constant and a wire operand

features.name: multi-bit constant OR with wire
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit wire assignment using bitwise OR between a constant and a wire operand

features.name: multi-bit constant XOR with wire
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit wire assignment using bitwise XOR between a constant and a wire operand
